name: SFDA Director Executed
shortDescription: Zheng Xiaoyu executed for corruption; symbol of regulatory rot
impact: Exposed approval system as broken; set stage for later overhaul

name: Order 117 / 722 Self-Inspection
shortDescription: Mass self-audit of clinical trial data
impact: ~80% of pending applications withdrawn due to fraud — brutal cleansing

name: Priority Review Pathway
shortDescription: Fast-track for innovative drugs and unmet need
impact: First substantive break from generics-first regime

name: Marketing Authorization Holder Pilot
impact: Made it possible for asset-light biotechs to own approved drugs

name: China Joins ICH
impact: Foreign trial data accepted; bridging trials enabled global pipelines

name: Conditional Approval Pathway
impact: Years shaved off oncology and rare-disease approvals

name: NRDL Annual Negotiations Resume
shortDescription: National reimbursement list updates after 8-year freeze
impact: Created regular path to mass market — at the price of steep discounts

name: HKEX Chapter 18A
shortDescription: Pre-revenue biotechs allowed to IPO in Hong Kong
impact: Unlocked tens of billions in biotech funding overnight

name: NHSA Established
impact: Concentrated bargaining power; enabled VBP at national scale

name: Volume-Based Procurement
impact: Crushed generic margins; forced industry toward true innovation

name: CFDA Renamed NMPA
shortDescription: Restructured under State Administration for Market Regulation
impact: Signaled completion of the 2015–2018 reform package

name: STAR Market Launches
shortDescription: Shanghai exchange opens to pre-revenue tech and biotech
impact: Second IPO venue; reduced reliance on HK and US listings

name: New Drug Registration Regulation
shortDescription: Comprehensive overhaul codifying the reform decade
impact: Locked in conditional approval, breakthrough designation, real-world evidence

name: Value-Oriented Oncology Guideline
shortDescription: NMPA explicitly discourages me-too oncology drugs
impact: Demanded head-to-head vs standard of care; killed PD-1 me-too rush

name: Human Genetic Resources Tightening
shortDescription: Restrictions on cross-border genetic data and samples
impact: Complicated multinational trials and academic collaborations

name: BIOSECURE Act Introduced
shortDescription: US bill targeting WuXi AppTec, WuXi Biologics, BGI, MGI, Complete Genomics
impact: Existential threat to China CRO/CDMO revenue from US clients
